e.p: I'm upset because the team was loud during work.
e.m: Nói bạn đã nghe chuyện gì. Nói cảm xúc của bạn. Đề xuất một hành động bạn sẽ làm.
e.h: Use 'I heard...' + Past Simple; then 'I was...' and 'I will...'
e.s: I heard the team was loud this morning. I was annoyed because I couldn't focus. I will ask them to lower their voices.

e.p: Someone keeps leaving dirty dishes in the sink and it bothers me.
e.m: Tóm tắt vấn đề. Nói bạn nghĩ ai phải làm gì. Nêu một giải pháp đơn giản.
e.h: Use 'should' or 'have to' and short reason with 'because'
e.s: You should wash your dishes or leave them in your locker. It makes the kitchen dirty because everyone uses it. We can put a sign to remind people.

e.p: I heard two people argued loudly yesterday near my desk.
e.m: Xác nhận bạn biết việc đó. Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào. Nêu việc bạn sẽ làm để giúp.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'I felt...' + 'I will...'
e.s: I heard the argument yesterday. I felt worried about the team mood. I will talk to both people calmly tomorrow.

e.p: The meeting room was taken all morning and I couldn't use it.
e.m: Nói ngắn gọn việc xảy ra. Nói hậu quả với bạn. Đề xuất một quy tắc nhỏ.
e.h: Use Past Simple and 'so' or 'because'; propose rule with 'we should' or 'let's'
e.s: The meeting room was taken all morning, so I couldn't work there. I felt frustrated because I had a call. We should book rooms in the calendar.

e.p: My colleague said the music was too loud and he couldn't finish his report.
e.m: Nhắc lại vấn đề. Nói cảm xúc của bạn. Đưa ra một hành động thực tế bạn sẽ làm ngay.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'was' + 'I will' or 'I'll' and short reason
e.s: He said the music was too loud and he couldn't finish his report. I felt sorry he struggled. I'll turn the music down now.

d.t: Thảo luận về dự án và deadline

e.p: We missed the project deadline last week.
e.m: Nói việc đã xảy ra. Nói một lý do chính. Nêu một việc bạn will làm để tránh lặp lại.
e.h: Use Past Simple, 'because', then 'I will...'
e.s: We missed the deadline last week because a task was delayed. It caused stress for the team. I will set earlier checkpoints next time.

e.p: I think the tasks were not clear, so people did them differently.
e.m: Xác nhận vấn đề. Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào. Đề xuất cách làm rõ nhiệm vụ.
e.h: Use 'I think' + 'I felt' + 'we should' or 'let's'
e.s: I agree the tasks were unclear. I felt confused too. We should write clear steps and share them in the meeting.

e.p: One member did less work and the others were upset.
e.m: Tóm tắt tình huống. Nói tác động lên nhóm. Đề xuất một quy tắc phân công công việc.
e.h: Use Past Simple, 'so' and 'we have to' or 'should'
e.s: One member did less work, so others felt upset. It slowed the whole project. We have to divide tasks clearly and track progress.

e.p: The client wants the report earlier tomorrow. Can we finish?
e.m: Nói khả năng hoàn thành. Nếu không thể, nêu lý do ngắn. Đưa ra một giải pháp thay thế.
e.h: Use 'We can' or 'We can't' + because; propose 'we will' or 'let's'
e.s: We can't finish the full report by tomorrow because some data is missing. I am sorry about that. Let's send a summary first and finish details later.

e.p: Someone suggested changing the project scope to make it easier.
e.m: Bày tỏ ý kiến của bạn về thay đổi ấy. So sánh ngắn: thay đổi hơn/ít hơn gì. Kết luận đề nghị tiếp theo.
e.h: Use comparatives (more/less) and 'I think' + 'we should'
e.s: Changing the scope makes the project less complex and more doable. It is less risky than keeping all tasks. I think we should discuss the new scope with the client.

d.t: Gặp xung đột vì phân chia công việc

e.p: I feel I do most of the work and it's unfair.
e.m: Nhắc lại cảm giác. Nói ví dụ ngắn về việc bạn làm. Đề xuất thay đổi đơn giản.
e.h: Use 'I feel' + Past Simple example + 'we should'
e.s: I feel you do most of the work and it's unfair. For example, you handled three tasks last week. We should make a fair task list for everyone.

e.p: He says he was busy with other projects so he couldn't help.
e.m: Tóm tắt lời người kia. Nói bạn hiểu hay không. Nêu một lựa chọn giải quyết.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'I understand' or 'I don't understand' + 'we can...'
e.s: He said he was busy with other projects, and I understand that. But the team still needs help. We can ask for temporary support or reassign tasks.

e.p: Two people want the same task and both are ready to work on it.
e.m: Nói ngắn về vấn đề. So sánh hai lựa chọn (ai hợp hơn). Đề xuất cách quyết định.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'let's' or 'we will decide by...'
e.s: Both want the task, but Anna has more experience so she is more suitable. It will be faster with Anna. Let's let Anna lead and the other person assist.

e.p: A team member refused a task because it was outside their job.
e.m: Nói hành động họ làm. Nói bạn nghĩ họ nên làm gì. Nêu một điều bạn sẽ làm như quản lý nhóm.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'should' + 'I will' or 'I'll'
e.s: They refused the task because it was outside their job. They should discuss skills and training first. I'll talk with them and reassign tasks fairly.

e.p: We need to split a big task quickly and no one agrees how.
e.m: Tóm tắt yêu cầu. Đưa ra hai lựa chọn ngắn. Chọn một giải pháp và nói tại sao.
e.h: Present Simple for options, choose with 'because' and 'we will/let's'
e.s: We can split by time or by type of work. Splitting by type is more efficient because each person has strengths. We will assign parts by skill.

d.t: Phản hồi tiêu cực trong cuộc họp

e.p: During the meeting you said my idea was weak.
e.m: Nói bạn nhớ điều gì đã xảy ra. Nói cảm xúc của bạn. Hỏi một câu để hiểu ý họ.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'I felt' + a short question with 'why' or 'can you explain'
e.s: You said my idea was weak during the meeting. I felt disappointed by that comment. Can you explain which part was weak?

e.p: The manager criticized the report and said it was late.
e.m: Nhắc lại lời phê bình. Nói bạn đồng ý hay không và lý do ngắn. Đề nghị cách cải thiện.
e.h: Use 'I agree' or 'I disagree' + because; propose with 'we should' or 'let's'
e.s: The manager said the report was late and had issues. I agree it needed more checks because some data was wrong. We should review reports earlier next time.

e.p: Someone interrupted you and said your point was not clear.
e.m: Nêu hành động xảy ra. Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào. Yêu cầu họ đưa ví dụ cụ thể.
e.h: Past Simple + 'I felt' + question with 'can you give an example?'
e.s: They interrupted and said my point was not clear. I felt embarrassed by the interruption. Can you give an example of what was unclear?

e.p: A colleague said your slides were too long and boring.
e.m: Tóm tắt nhận xét. Thừa nhận một phần nếu có. Nêu bạn will làm gì để cải thiện.
e.h: Use 'I agree to some extent' or 'I disagree' + 'I will' + reason
e.s: They said my slides were too long and boring. I agree some slides were long because I added details. I will shorten slides and add clear bullets.

e.p: After the meeting someone said you must improve your communication skills.
e.m: Nhắc lại lời khuyên. Nói cảm xúc của bạn. Lập kế hoạch ngắn: một việc bạn sẽ làm để cải thiện.
e.h: Use 'You should' or 'I should' + future action with 'will' or 'going to'
e.s: They said I must improve my communication skills. I felt a bit worried but ready to learn. I will practice short presentations and ask for feedback.

e.p: You missed a deadline and the client complained.
e.m: Thừa nhận lỗi ngắn. Nói lý do (không biện hộ quá). Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để sửa lỗi.
e.h: Use 'I'm sorry' + Past Simple reason + 'I will...'
e.s: I'm sorry I missed the deadline. I had an unexpected issue with the data. I will finish the revisions today and send them to the client.

e.p: A co-worker said you forgot an important meeting.
e.m: Xác nhận việc quên. Nói cảm xúc tội lỗi/ngại. Đề xuất cách tránh lặp lại.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'I felt' + 'I will' (preventive action)
e.s: I forgot the meeting yesterday and I feel sorry about that. I felt embarrassed when I missed it. I will set calendar alerts and prepare earlier.

e.p: Your mistake caused extra work for the team.
e.m: Thừa nhận tác động. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để giúp bù đắp. Nói bạn sẽ học gì từ đó.
e.h: Use 'It caused' + 'I will help by...' + 'I will learn to...'
e.s: My mistake caused extra work for the team and I am sorry. I will stay late to help finish the tasks. I will double-check my work next time.

e.p: Someone asked why you didn't follow the new procedure.
e.m: Giải thích ngắn (Past Simple). Thừa nhận nếu sai. Nêu một bước để tuân thủ từ giờ.
e.h: Use Past Simple for reason, 'I should have' or 'I will' for future
e.s: I didn't follow the new procedure because I didn't see the email. I should have checked messages. I will read updates and ask questions when unclear.

e.p: A client was unhappy and asked for compensation after your error.
e.m: Thừa nhận vấn đề. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để xử lý khách hàng. Nêu cam kết ngắn cho tương lai.
e.h: Use 'I am sorry' + 'I will' + 'we will' for future promise
e.s: I am sorry for the error that upset the client. I will fix the issue and offer a small discount. We will improve checks so this won't happen again.

d.t: Tư vấn cho đồng nghiệp căng thẳng

e.p: I'm stressed because I have many deadlines this week.
e.m: Đồng cảm ngắn. Nói một lời khuyên đơn giản. Đề nghị giúp cụ thể.
e.h: Use 'I understand' + 'you should' + 'I can help by...'
e.s: I understand you are stressed with many deadlines. You should list tasks and set small goals. I can help by taking one task off your list.

e.p: He can't sleep because of work worries and he is tired at the office.
e.m: Xác nhận vấn đề. Đưa hai lời khuyên: một về giấc ngủ, một về công việc. Kết luận khuyến khích ngắn.
e.h: Use 'You should' twice and a short encouraging sentence 'It will help.'
e.s: You should try a regular bedtime and avoid screens before sleep. You should also talk with the manager about workload. It will help reduce stress.

e.p: A teammate says they feel ignored in meetings.
e.m: Nói bạn hiểu cảm xúc. Gợi ý một hành động họ nên làm trong cuộc họp. Nói bạn sẽ hỗ trợ gì.
e.h: Use 'I understand' + 'you should' + 'I will' or 'I'll'
e.s: I understand you feel ignored in meetings. You should speak up early with a short point. I'll support you by backing your idea in the next meeting.

e.p: Someone is anxious about giving feedback to a senior colleague.
e.m: Thừa nhận khó khăn. Đưa bước thực tế nhỏ để làm nhẹ việc. Đưa một câu giúp họ an tâm.
e.h: Use 'You can' or 'You should' + 'because' + 'It will...'
e.s: I know it's hard to give feedback to a senior. You can prepare notes and practice one sentence. It will be easier and more professional.

e.p: A person feels overwhelmed and considers leaving the job.
e.m: Xác nhận cảm xúc. Nói hai lựa chọn ngắn: giữ hay nghỉ. Đưa lời khuyên giúp họ quyết định.
e.h: Use Present Simple for choices, 'you should' for advice, and 'talk to' for support
e.s: I understand you feel overwhelmed and consider leaving. You can take a short break or discuss a lighter workload. You should talk to HR or the manager before deciding.

d.t: Thỏa thuận cách làm việc nhóm

e.p: We need rules for quiet hours in the office.
e.m: Đề xuất một quy tắc ngắn. Nói lý do vì sao cần. Nêu bạn sẽ làm gì để triển khai.
e.h: Use 'We should' + because + 'I will' or 'Let's'
e.s: We should set quiet hours from 2 to 4 pm because many people need focus time. It will reduce distractions. I will add it to the team calendar.

e.p: People keep replying late to messages and work is delayed.
e.m: Tóm tắt vấn đề. Đưa một quy tắc phản hồi thời gian. Nêu lợi ích ngắn.
e.h: Use 'We should reply within...' and 'so' for benefit
e.s: We should reply to messages within one working day so tasks move faster. It will help avoid delays. Let's agree on a response window.

e.p: Some people prefer online chat and others prefer email.
e.m: Nói ngắn sự khác nhau. Đề xuất cách đồng bộ. Nêu bạn sẽ làm gì để giúp nhóm tuân thủ.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'we will' or 'let's' for agreement
e.s: Chat is faster but email is clearer for records. We will use chat for quick checks and email for final decisions. I'll write the guideline and share it.

e.p: A new member joined and is unsure about team norms.
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để giúp họ hiểu. Liệt kê hai việc bạn sẽ làm. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I will' twice and 'because' for reason
e.s: I will give them a short welcome guide and explain our rules. I will also pair them with a buddy for the first week because support helps them settle.

e.p: We need to decide how to give feedback on work drafts.
e.m: Đề xuất hai bước đơn giản để feedback. Nêu một quy tắc lịch sự. Kết luận bằng lợi ích ngắn.
e.h: Use imperatives or 'we should' and present simple for rules
e.s: We should give written comments first and then discuss in a short meeting. Please be specific and kind in feedback. This will improve work and keep trust.

d.t: Giải quyết xung đột vì chậm tiến độ

e.p: The report is late because the data was not ready.
e.m: Nhắc lại nguyên nhân. Nói hậu quả lên khách hàng hoặc nhóm. Đề xuất bước sửa chữa ngay.
e.h: Use Past Simple, 'so' and 'we will' to fix
e.s: The data was not ready, so the report is late. The client is waiting and the team is stressed. We will collect missing data today and send an update.

e.p: One team member blames another for a delay.
e.m: Tóm tắt tình huống. Nói cách bạn sẽ can thiệp ngắn. Nêu mục tiêu của can thiệp.
e.h: Use 'I will' + 'to' + 'so that' or 'because'
e.s: One blames another for the delay, and tensions rose. I will speak to both privately to understand facts. The goal is to find a fair solution and resume work.

e.p: The deadline moved earlier and some tasks overlap now.
e.m: Nói vấn đề hiện tại. Đưa hai điều ưu tiên ngắn để giải quyết. Nêu bạn sẽ phân công như thế nào.
e.h: Use 'first' and 'then' or 'we will' with reasons
e.s: The earlier deadline caused task overlap. First we will identify critical tasks, then reassign noncritical ones. I will assign urgent tasks to experienced members.

e.p: People are arguing about who must redo work after a mistake.
e.m: Nói tóm tắt sự cố. Nêu nguyên tắc công bằng bạn đề xuất. Cho biết bạn sẽ làm gì để thực hiện nguyên tắc đó.
e.h: Use 'should' for principle and 'I will' for action
e.s: After the mistake, everyone argued about who should redo work. The fair rule is that the team shares corrections based on capacity. I will coordinate the redo plan and ask for volunteers.

e.p: A manager demands faster delivery, but quality may drop.
e.m: Trình bày mối lo ngại ngắn. So sánh hai lựa chọn (nhanh hơn hoặc chất lượng hơn). Đề nghị một phương án trung gian.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'we should' + 'because'
e.s: Faster delivery may make quality worse, and I am worried about errors. Fast delivery is quicker but less thorough; slower work is more accurate. We should send a basic version first and finish full quality soon.

d.t: Đàm phán về việc thay đổi nhiệm vụ

e.p: I want to change my task because I don't have the right skills.
e.m: Nói bạn hiểu hay không. Nêu một lý do ngắn. Đề xuất một lựa chọn thay thế.
e.h: Use 'I understand' + 'because' + 'we can' or 'you can'
e.s: I understand you want to change the task because you lack the skills. That's okay. We can reassign it and give you training for next time.

e.p: The new task has a tight deadline and you are not available.
e.m: Nói bạn có thể làm hay không. Nếu không, nêu lý do. Đưa đề xuất ai hoặc cách khác làm.
e.h: Use 'I can't' + because, then 'we will' or 'let's' for solution
e.s: I can't take the new task because I have meetings all week. I am sorry. Let's ask Mark to cover or delay the deadline.

e.p: Someone offers to swap tasks with you to help.
e.m: Nêu cảm nhận về đề nghị. So sánh ngắn hai nhiệm vụ. Quyết định nhận hay từ chối và nói lý do.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'I will' or 'I won't' + because
e.s: I appreciate the offer to swap tasks. Your task is more urgent, and mine is longer. I will accept the swap because it helps the team finish sooner.

e.p: A manager asks you to take extra responsibility temporarily.
e.m: Trả lời có thể hay không. Nếu có, nêu thời gian bạn sẽ đảm nhiệm. Nếu không, nêu điều kiện bạn cần.
e.h: Use 'I can' or 'I can't' + time phrase or condition with 'if' or 'unless'
e.s: I can take the responsibility temporarily for two weeks. After that I need support because I have other deadlines. If that's okay, I will start Monday.

e.p: You prefer a different role but worry it will affect your workload.
e.m: Nói bạn muốn gì ngắn. Nói lo ngại chính. Đề xuất một giải pháp thử nghiệm.
e.h: Use 'I want' + 'but' + 'we could/let's try' with future plan
e.s: I want the different role because it matches my skills, but I worry about extra workload. We could try a one-month trial and review results. If it works, we will make the change permanent.

d.t: Giải quyết hiểu lầm qua email

e.p: Your email said the file was not updated, but I updated it yesterday.
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm gì (Past Simple). Nói bạn hiểu nhầm ở đâu. Đề nghị kiểm tra lại file cùng nhau.
e.h: Use Past Simple + 'I think' + 'let's' or 'can we'
e.s: I updated the file yesterday and saved it. I think there was a version issue. Can we check the file together now?

e.p: Someone replied angrily to your message and you are surprised.
e.m: Nói bạn đã đọc thư. Nói cảm xúc của bạn. Viết một câu hỏi dịu để làm rõ ý họ.
e.h: Use Present Simple for feeling and a polite question 'could you explain...?'
e.s: I read your message and I am surprised by the tone. I felt upset because it seemed sharp. Could you explain which part upset you?

e.p: The client misunderstood the delivery date in the email.
e.m: Xác nhận nhầm lẫn. Nêu ngày đúng ngắn. Đề xuất một email sửa lỗi ngắn bạn sẽ gửi.
e.h: Use Present Simple for correct info and 'I will send' for action
e.s: I see the client misunderstood the delivery date; the correct date is May 10. I will send a correction email and apologize for the confusion.

e.p: Your colleague thinks you did not copy them on an important email.
e.m: Giải thích ngắn (Past Simple if you did or didn't). Nếu sai, xin lỗi. Nêu bước bạn will take để khắc phục.
e.h: Use 'I didn't' or 'I did' + 'I'm sorry' + 'I will...'
e.s: I didn't copy you on that email and I'm sorry. It was an oversight. I will forward the email now and include you in future messages.

e.p: An email thread became long and people are confused about next steps.
e.m: Tóm tắt vấn đề. Nêu hai bước rõ ràng tiếp theo. Kêu gọi đồng ý ngắn.
e.h: Use imperatives or 'Let's' and present simple for steps
e.s: The long email thread caused confusion about next steps. First, let's list two clear actions and owners. Then we will set a deadline. Do you agree?

d.t: Trung gian hòa giải giữa hai đồng nghiệp

e.p: Two colleagues are arguing about who took credit for an idea.
e.m: Tóm tắt vấn đề ngắn. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trước hết. Nêu mục tiêu của cuộc nói chuyện hòa giải.
e.h: Use 'I will' + 'to' + 'so that' or 'because'
e.s: They argued over credit for an idea. I will speak with both privately to hear their sides. The goal is to find the real facts and restore trust.

e.p: One person feels their effort was ignored in a project.
e.m: Đồng cảm ngắn. Nói một bước bạn đề nghị để thừa nhận công sức họ. Nêu lợi ích cho nhóm.
e.h: Use 'I understand' + 'we can' + 'so' for benefit
e.s: I understand you feel ignored. We can mention everyone's contributions in the next update to acknowledge effort. This will improve team morale.

e.p: They cannot meet face to face because of schedules.
e.m: Đề xuất cách khác để hòa giải (online or email). Nêu hai nội dung chính phải nói trong cuộc hòa giải.
e.h: Use 'Let's' or 'We can' and list two short points
e.s: Let's have a short video call this week. We can discuss the timeline and who did what. That will clarify the situation.

e.p: Both insist they were right and won't change their view.
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để giảm căng thẳng. Đề xuất một thỏa thuận nhỏ cho hiện tại. Nêu thời hạn kiểm tra lại.
e.h: Use 'I will' + 'let's' + time phrase like 'in one week'
e.s: I will ask them to pause the argument and work together for now. Let's agree to share tasks and review results in one week. We will reassess then.

e.p: After mediation they want rules to avoid future conflict.
e.m: Đề xuất hai quy tắc ngắn. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để ghi lại và lan tỏa quy tắc đó.
e.h: Use 'We should' twice and 'I will' to record
e.s: We should credit ideas in writing and discuss roles at the start of projects. I will write these rules and share them with the team.

d.t: Chính sách văn phòng và kỳ vọng

e.p: HR reminds everyone about respectful behavior at work.
e.m: Tóm tắt thông điệp chính. Nói lý do nó quan trọng. Nêu một hành động bạn will làm để tuân thủ.
e.h: Use Present Simple and 'because' and 'I will' or 'I'll'
e.s: HR asks for respectful behavior at work because it keeps a positive environment. It is important for teamwork. I will be mindful of my tone and listen more.

e.p: There is a new rule about flexible working hours.
e.m: Nói bạn hiểu gì về quy định. Nêu hai điều bạn cần làm để tuân thủ. Kết luận lợi ích ngắn.
e.h: Use Present Simple and imperatives or 'I will' for actions
e.s: The rule says you must inform your manager and record hours in the system. I will tell my manager and log my time. It will help scheduling and fairness.

e.p: A policy says everyone must attend weekly team updates.
e.m: Bày tỏ ý kiến ngắn (đồng ý/không). Nếu không, nêu lý do và một đề xuất thay thế. Nếu đồng ý, nêu lợi ích ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I agree' or 'I don't agree' + because and 'we could' for alternative
e.s: I agree that weekly updates help team alignment. If someone cannot attend, we could record the meeting and share notes. This keeps everyone informed.

e.p: Some find the new policy too strict and want exceptions.
e.m: Nói bạn nghĩ về việc nới lỏng hay không. Đưa điều kiện bạn chấp nhận ngoại lệ. Nêu cách ghi nhận ngoại lệ.
e.h: Use 'I think' + 'if' + 'we will' for recording exceptions
e.s: I think some exceptions are okay if requests are valid and approved. If the reason is important, we will allow exceptions with manager approval. We will record exceptions in the system.

e.p: A teammate asks how to raise a policy concern safely.
e.m: Hướng dẫn hai bước ngắn họ nên làm. Nói bạn sẽ hỗ trợ gì. Kết luận khuyến khích ngắn.
e.h: Use imperatives or 'you should' + 'I will' and 'It will...'
e.s: You should first write a clear note and then speak with HR or your manager. I will help review your note before you send it. It will make your concern clear and safe.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống tổng hợp 1

e.p: A client complained after a delayed and low-quality delivery.
e.m: Tóm tắt vấn đề. Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào. Nêu một bước bạn will take để giải quyết ngay.
e.h: Use Past Simple, 'I felt' and 'I will' for action
e.s: The delivery was delayed and the quality was low, and the client complained. I felt sorry and worried about the client. I will contact the client, apologize, and fix the issues today.

e.p: Two team members argue about task ownership in public.
e.m: Xác nhận điều xảy ra. Nói bạn sẽ can thiệp thế nào ngay. Nêu mục tiêu can thiệp.
e.h: Use 'I will' + 'to' + 'so that' and Past Simple if needed
e.s: They argued about task ownership in public. I will ask them to stop and talk privately to avoid more tension. The goal is to clarify ownership and calm the team.

e.p: A colleague says they feel overloaded and missed a deadline.
e.m: Đồng cảm ngắn. Đưa hai đề xuất giúp giảm tải. Nêu bạn sẽ hỗ trợ gì trong tuần này.
e.h: Use 'You should' or 'We can' and 'I will' for help
e.s: I understand you feel overloaded. We can reassign some tasks and set smaller goals. I will take one task this week to help.

e.p: An email led to a misunderstanding about who must review a draft.
e.m: Nói giải thích ngắn cho đồng nghiệp. Đề xuất một quy tắc đơn giản để tránh lặp lại. Nêu bạn will làm gì để sửa lỗi hiện tại.
e.h: Use Present Simple for rule and 'I will' for fix
e.s: The email caused confusion about the reviewer. Let's always name the reviewer clearly in the subject line. I will resend the email with the correct reviewer now.

e.p: A manager asks you to choose between speed and quality for a product launch.
e.m: Nói lo ngại của bạn. So sánh ngắn hai lựa chọn. Đề xuất giải pháp trung gian.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'we should' + 'because'
e.s: I worry that speed may reduce quality and harm our reputation. Faster delivery is quicker but less thorough, while slower work is more reliable. We should launch a basic version first and finish full quality soon.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống tổng hợp 2

e.p: A new member feels excluded in group chats and is unhappy.
e.m: Xác nhận tình trạng. Nói hai việc bạn sẽ làm để giúp họ. Nêu lợi ích cho nhóm nếu bạn làm vậy.
e.h: Use 'I will' twice and 'so' for benefit
e.s: They feel excluded in group chats and are unhappy. I will invite them to meetings and ask for their input. This will help them join the team and improve ideas.

e.p: Someone kept changing shared files without note and caused errors.
e.m: Nói ngắn hành động họ làm. Nói hậu quả. Đề xuất một quy tắc để tránh việc này.
e.h: Use Past Simple for action, 'so' for result, and 'we should' for rule
e.s: They changed shared files without notes, so errors appeared. It caused rework for others. We should add change notes and use version control.

e.p: A disagreement started because roles were unclear at project start.
e.m: Tóm tắt nguồn gốc. Nêu hai điều cần làm để rõ vai trò. Nói ai sẽ chịu trách nhiệm thiết lập điều đó.
e.h: Use 'we need to' and 'I will' or 'the manager will'
e.s: The disagreement came from unclear roles at the project start. We need to list tasks and assign owners. I will draft the task list and the manager will approve it.

e.p: A colleague gave harsh public feedback and the receiver is upset.
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trước tiên. Đưa hai bước để khắc phục tình hình. Kết luận lời nhắc ngắn cho phong cách giao tiếp.
e.h: Use 'I will' and imperatives or 'we should' for steps
e.s: I will speak with both privately to calm things down. We will ask the feedback giver to apologize and suggest private feedback next time. Please be constructive and kind when giving feedback.

e.p: The team must decide on a new shared tool but opinions differ.
e.m: Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để giúp nhóm quyết định. Nêu hai tiêu chí đánh giá công cụ. Kết luận bằng đề xuất thời gian thử nghiệm.
e.h: Use 'we will' + criteria in short phrases and 'let's' for trial
e.s: I will organize a short demo for each tool to help decide. Evaluate by ease of use and cost. Let's try the chosen tool for two weeks and then review.

d.t: Ôn tập: Tình huống tổng hợp 3

e.p: A client is angry, a teammate is defensive, and the manager is silent.
e.m: Tóm tắt ba vấn đề. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì trước nhất. Nêu mục tiêu bạn muốn đạt được sau khi can thiệp.
e.h: Use Present Simple for summary and 'I will' + 'so that' for goal
e.s: The client is angry, a teammate is defensive, and the manager is silent. I will contact the client to apologize and calm the situation. The goal is to resolve the issue and restore trust.

e.p: Two people keep sending messages to each other at night and it disturbs others.
e.m: Nói vấn đề. Đưa một quy tắc lịch sự cho liên lạc ngoài giờ. Nêu bạn sẽ làm gì để thông báo quy tắc.
e.h: Use 'We should' + 'so' and 'I will' to inform
e.s: Their messages at night disturb others who sleep. We should avoid non-urgent messages after 9 pm so everyone can rest. I will share this guideline in the team chat.

e.p: A member claims you didn't give credit for their contribution in a report.
e.m: Thừa nhận hay giải thích ngắn. Nếu đúng, xin lỗi. Nêu hành động bạn will làm để sửa báo cáo.
e.h: Use 'I am sorry' or 'I explained' + 'I will' to fix
e.s: I am sorry if I missed your contribution in the report. It was not intentional. I will update the report now and mention your work.

e.p: The team is split between two approaches and can't agree.
e.m: Nêu hai lựa chọn ngắn. So sánh ngắn ưu/nhược. Đề nghị cách quyết định tạm thời.
e.h: Use comparatives and 'let's' or 'we will' for decision
e.s: One approach is faster but less tested; the other is slower but more reliable. The slower approach is more careful, while the faster is quicker. Let's pilot the faster one on a small scope and decide after results.

e.p: After a tough week, morale is low and conflicts rise.
e.m: Xác nhận tình trạng. Đề xuất hai việc ngắn để nâng tinh thần. Nêu bạn will làm gì đầu tiên.
e.h: Use 'We should' twice and 'I will' for first action
e.s: Morale is low and conflicts are rising after a tough week. We should organize a short team break and share appreciation notes. I will arrange a short team coffee and ask everyone to mention one good thing.
